name: std-browse-gallery
description: Gallery browse — image-first responsive card grid (Pinterest/Dribbble) using data-grid with auto-fit minCardWidth so it stays a grid from 3 cols above 1200px down to 1 col under 600px.

schema.name: std-browse-gallery
schema.description: Gallery browse — image-first responsive card grid (Pinterest/Dribbble) using data-grid with auto-fit minCardWidth so it stays a grid from 3 cols above 1200px down to 1 col under 600px.

fields.name: name
fields.description: The item's display name or title.

fields.name: description
fields.description: A brief text providing details about the item.

fields.name: status
fields.description: Indicates the current state of the item.

fields.name: price
fields.description: The monetary cost associated with the item.

fields.name: thumbnailLabel
fields.description: Text displayed for the image preview.

emits.description: Signals that a browse item has been successfully loaded.
Indicates a failure to load a browse item.
Signals a grid view has been displayed or updated.
Signals a request to edit the selected item.
Signals a request to remove an item from the dataset.

events.name: BrowseItem loaded
events.description: Signals that a browse item has been successfully loaded.

events.name: BrowseItem load failed
events.description: Indicates a failure to load a browse item.

events.name: Refetch Query
events.description: Triggers a data refresh based on the current query.

events.name: Refetch Filter
events.description: Triggers a data refresh based on current filter criteria.

events.name: Refetch Page
events.description: Triggers a data grid page refresh.

events.name: View
events.description: Signals a grid view has been displayed or updated.

events.name: Edit
events.description: Signals a request to edit the selected item.

events.name: Delete
events.description: Signals a request to remove an item from the dataset.

children.className: sticky top-0 z-10 -mx-6 px-6 py-3 bg-[var(--color-surface)]/95 backdrop-blur border-b border-[var(--color-border)]

renderItem.className: group rounded-lg overflow-hidden bg-[var(--color-card)] border border-[var(--color-border)] shadow-sm hover:shadow-hover hover:-translate-y-0.5 transition-all duration-normal cursor-pointer

children.className: sticky top-0 z-10 -mx-6 px-6 py-3 bg-[var(--color-surface)]/95 backdrop-blur border-b border-[var(--color-border)]

renderItem.className: group rounded-lg overflow-hidden bg-[var(--color-card)] border border-[var(--color-border)] shadow-sm hover:shadow-hover hover:-translate-y-0.5 transition-all duration-normal cursor-pointer

maxInlineActions.label: How many row actions to show before collapsing?
maxInlineActions.description: Actions beyond this count collapse into a '⋯' overflow menu. Set 2–3 for dense tables.
maxInlineActions.synonyms: inline actions limit, overflow threshold, max buttons per row

categoryBinding.label: Category field binding
categoryBinding.description: Binding path for the category/tag slot.

gap.label: Spacing between rows
gap.description: Gap between grid cells: sm, md, or lg.
gap.synonyms: row gap, cell spacing, grid gap, padding between items

columns.label: Table columns
columns.description: Column definitions for table-style variants (dense). Each maps an entity field to a column with optional width / align / weight / format.

imageLabelBinding.label: Image label binding
imageLabelBinding.description: Binding path for the image-area label slot.

filters.label: Which filters should appear above the list?
filters.description: Dropdown filter facets by field. Each fires a refetch when the user changes the selection. Empty = no filter bar.
filters.synonyms: filter bar, faceted filters, field filters, column filters, dropdowns

priceBinding.label: Price field binding
priceBinding.description: Binding path for the price/amount overlay slot.

assigneeBinding.label: Assignee field binding
assigneeBinding.description: Binding path for the assignee/owner slot.

titleBinding.label: Title field binding
titleBinding.description: Binding path for the card title slot (e.g. @item.dishName).

viewPattern.label: Render pattern
viewPattern.description: UI pattern used to render the collection. Used by the default bodyContent tree; Layer 3 variants override bodyContent directly instead and may ignore this knob.

fields.label: Which fields should appear as columns?
fields.description: Each entry maps one entity field to a display column with an optional label and variant.
fields.synonyms: visible columns, displayed fields, card fields, column list

metaBinding.label: Meta field binding
metaBinding.description: Binding path for the secondary meta slot (timestamp / category).

searchPlaceholder.label: Search box placeholder text
searchPlaceholder.description: Hint text inside the list search box (e.g. 'Search orders…').
searchPlaceholder.synonyms: search hint, placeholder, search box text, search label

priorityBinding.label: Priority field binding
priorityBinding.description: Binding path for the priority slot.

displayPageSize.label: How many rows to show at once?
displayPageSize.description: Rows visible per page before the pagination control appears.
displayPageSize.synonyms: visible rows, items per page, display limit, show per page

badgeBinding.label: Badge field binding
badgeBinding.description: Binding path for the status/badge slot.

descriptionBinding.label: Description field binding
descriptionBinding.description: Binding path for the card body/subtitle slot.

cols.label: How many columns in the grid?
cols.description: Number of columns in the responsive card/grid layout.
cols.synonyms: columns, grid width, card columns, num columns

pageSize.label: How many rows to fetch per page?
pageSize.description: Records fetched from the server per page request.
pageSize.synonyms: fetch limit, records per page, batch size, page limit

children.className: sticky top-0 z-10 -mx-6 px-6 py-3 bg-[var(--color-surface)]/95 backdrop-blur border-b border-[var(--color-border)]

renderItem.className: group rounded-lg overflow-hidden bg-[var(--color-card)] border border-[var(--color-border)] shadow-sm hover:shadow-hover hover:-translate-y-0.5 transition-all duration-normal cursor-pointer

bodyContent.label: Body content tree
bodyContent.description: Render-ui SExpr rendered after rows load. Default is the canonical data-grid call wrapped in a stack. Layer 3 variants override this with their own tree (composing data-list/data-grid/entity-table + custom renderItem lambdas + filter-group, kbd, card, etc.) to deliver entirely different browse UX while inheriting the same trait, state machine, emits, and listens.

itemActions.label: What actions can users take on each row?
itemActions.description: Buttons rendered on each row (e.g. Edit, Delete, View).
itemActions.synonyms: row buttons, row actions, item actions, per-row buttons, table actions

imageField.label: Which field holds the row image?
imageField.description: Entity field containing the thumbnail URL for each row.
imageField.synonyms: image field, thumbnail field, photo field, picture column

fields.name: description
fields.description: A textual explanation or summary of the item.

fields.name: status
fields.description: Indicates the current operational state of the item.
